description: In ESA SNAP Desktop, create a deterministic rule-based land cover classification from the multi-spectral image `~/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif`. Generate a `Land_Cover` band using the following classification logic: Class 1 (Water) where NDWI > 0.1; Class 2 (DenseVeg) where NDVI > 0.5 and not Water; Class 3 (SparseVeg) where NDVI is between 0.2 and 0.5 and not Water; and Class 4 (Barren) for all other pixels. Calculate NDWI as `(band_4 - band_2) / (band_4 + band_2)` and NDVI as `(band_2 - band_3) / (band_2 + band_3)`. Set the `Land_Cover` band description to exactly `1=Water, 2=DenseVeg, 3=SparseVeg, 4=Barren`. Save the product in BEAM-DIMAP format to `~/snap_exports/expert_classification.dim` and export it as a GeoTIFF to `~/snap_exports/expert_classification.tif`.
